question.label: Promotion feedback
question.name: What feedback from the promotion decision actually stuck with you?
question.description: Surfaces what he heard versus what was intended, and whether it became usable.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He defaulted to delivery because it felt controllable, which signals the promotion feedback did not translate into clear guidance; also hints at a narrowed growth posture.

new_queue.label: Controllable delivery
new_queue.name: When delivery felt controllable, what felt unclear or out of reach?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: What is the mentoring program doing for your week right now?

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What concrete path do you think exists for you from here?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
